full_text:
Zhang Wen (Huishu) 張溫 (惠恕)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Wen (張溫), styledHuishu (惠恕), was born in Wucheng. Although he was talented, his association with poor friends led to his political downfall. Zhang Wen was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zhang Wen lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
